feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Multiple SAP Instance and Non-SAP Data | SAP ICMR
entry.content:
Hi, 

How can we configure ICMR in a way which involves fetching data from multiple SAP instances(for ACDOCA) as well as Non-SAP systems for Intercompany matching and reconciliation?

entry.title: I am truing to extend the app F1515 using adaptation project on BAS
entry.content:
I am attempting to extend the app using the adaptation project in BAS. My query is how to consume the URL defined in the SAP BTP destination. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 关于销售订单与交货数量及开票数量的问题
entry.content:
在创建销售订单时，已确定订单数量。

1、由于生产过程中存在正常的损耗，所以交货数量是实际产出的合格数量，而开票数量可能等于实际合格品的交货数量，也可能等于订单数量。

2、当一段时间后对客户进行不合格品交货时，不需要给客户开票，也不需要向客户收款。

针对以上业务情况，在配置为参考交货单开票的情况下：

1、如何实现在开票时修改开票数量。

2、如何实现在创建交货单时，选择不开票。

entry.title: Old values are restating while updating the withholding tax
entry.content: While updating the withholding tax codes in BP, system is automatically restates the tax category field value in Identification tab of BP general data.

entry.title: 309 transfer posting asking to Enter sales order
entry.content: Material to Material transfer in same plant is asking for Sales Order. I do not have a salesorder

entry.title: SAP ECC to S/4HANA with Qlik Sense
entry.content:
Hello,

Need advice on the best strategy for migrating from SAP ECC to S/4HANA while using Qlik Sense: should we maintain daily data extractions with Qlik using SAP tables, or opt to use CDS views? Bearing in mind that the latter option would require a complete adaptation of all Qlik applications? If so, would this adaptation be sensible and easy to undertake?

Thanks!

entry.title: In the Recent Version(2402), SAP S/4 Hana Cloud, Is there provision for Configuring Funds Management
entry.content: In the Recent Version(2402), SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud, Is there provision for Configuring Funds Management if not then How to proceed ?

entry.title: Capacity report (/SAPAPO/CDPS_REPT)
entry.content:
Hello

i have a question in capacity report

in resource utilization - capacity field 

can anyone explain how the capacity is calculated

thanks

entry.title: Profit Centers - Actuals (Design Studio) - "Jump to" - Navigation-Link
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

On the following SAP Fiori app:

Profit Centers - Actuals (Design Studio) - F0944A

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0944A')/S23OP

 

I face the following error:

The "Jump To"-Button does a infinity-loading after clicking on it. Result should just be the in-app navigation to other existing Fiori Applications that are related to this app eg. Display G/L Account Balances, etc. All error logs and console is empty:

Can someone help?

Regards,

Mann_im_Fass

entry.title: Two main items (A+B) with one free item(C) how can we automatic determine in the Sales Order SD
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Out client requirement is if Customer Purchase two products like (A+B) having selling price with A= 5 PAC + B = 4 PAC then Customer will get one free product like C 100% free with C = 1 PAC. This should be done by automatic free goods determination. 

How can we achieve this? I have tried with SD BoM Explore and also Cross selling functions, in both way this requirement is not achieve. Standard free goods determination concept is 1:1 here client requirement is 2:1.

Example : Sales Order-X having three components A, B, C
Automatic Free Goods Determination is the requirement from the client side. 
Item A - 5 PAC - 100 Taka.
Item B- 4 PAC -  80 Taka. 
Item C- 1 PAC - 0 Taka.

Thanks & Best Regards
Abul Hasnat

entry.title: how to maintain customer material info record with Ship to party/Custom partn + material combination
entry.content:
Hi Friends, 

Do we have any standard setting to maintain  'Customer master info record '  with Shipto party or Custom Partner with Material combination? in SAP S/4.

Thanks

SAP new learner

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Structure for Developer
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, learning ABAP development and working in SD Moule.
Are there Courses or Documents that help to understand SAP system from the Developer's point of view?
Where I can understand the flow of the data and code, learn the best practices, restrictions functions, etc.
Learn about implementing Extensions, Enhancements, Amendments, and Exist.
Also learn about extending or enhancing Fiori Launchpad Apps.
BAPI, ALV, etc.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Structure for Developer
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, learning ABAP development and working in SD Moule.
Are there Courses or Documents that help to understand SAP system from the Developer's point of view?
Where I can understand the flow of the data and code, learn the best practices, restrictions functions, etc.
Learn about implementing Extensions, Enhancements, Amendments, and Exist.
Also, learn about extending or enhancing Fiori Launchpad Apps.
BAPI, ALV, etc.

entry.title: Flexible Workflow for PR
entry.content:
Hi,

I have configured flexible workflow in S4 Hana 2022 private cloud system however while creating the PR I'm getting error as 'Recipient role with id '/RULE/MMPUR_PR_BD_AGNT' cannot be resolved', I have implemented the BAdi 'MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2' with custom logic of adding users to approver list in BAdi implementation. In Manage workflow app in recipient I have maintained role as BAdi agent determination. The standard workflow triggered is 'WS02000458' I have tried adding rule under agents with rule id '00800021' but still i'm getting the same error.

Could anyone please help me understand if i need to change any other settings in this workflow to enable BAdi determination logic.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Flexible Forecast consumption BADI not working
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm hoping someone can help me with my urgent query on flexible forecast consumption BADI. 

We have implemented MD_PIR_FLEX_CONS to consume PIR based on requirement plan. We have 3 different types of forecast for example OEM, Spares and Repair for a material.  

We are loading these 3 forecast type in MD61 as different requirement plan and consumption indicator '4' 

Our logic is to consume relevant forecast based on the distribution channel and schedule line category of a sales order line item. i.e if sales order is for distribution channel 10, then OEM forecast should consume and for 30 spares so on....

When we look at MD04 and or MD73 we can see forecast is getting consumed from correct bucket but when we run MRP, BADI is been called but MRP is create duplicate planned orders without consumption. for example if we have Independent req of 100 and sales order of 50 for OEM, in MD04 we can see PIR after consumption equal = 50 and Sales order = 50. But MRP is created planned orders for 150 qty.

During debugging the implemented BADI we have found that for MRP transactions like MD02/MD03 internal table IM_MDPS (method - GET_REQ_CONS_CHARACTERISTIC) is blank (missing value for field - DELNR) for MRP element 'VC' (sales order) but it has details for all other MRP elements. Whereas for transaction like MD04, same internal table IM_MDPS inside the BADI would have 'VC' sales order details.

Since for MRP run transaction IM_MDPS table has no sales order details consumption is not happening and MRP would create duplicate planned orders.

While doing some research I have noticed, for MRP on HANA there is a similar issue with MD05 -MRP list where Sales order and dependent req MRP element would display blank. Very similar behavior as our issue. 

I have also looked at table MDTB for the material, same issue, missing 'DELNR' field for 'VC' MRP element type. 

Would you be kind enough, what am I missing here. Why IM_MDPS is blank for VC elements for MRP transaction.

We are on S/4 HANA 2021 on premise using classic MRP

entry.title: Question about report for Sales in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition - Out of the box reports or CDS
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from customer for Sales LOB reports that they wanted to have a report that shows the product cost price which is maintained on the material master level and also the sales price of a material. I tried to look up out of the box reports given by SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for Sales, couldn't actually find one and also tried to look for the standard CDS Views but couldn't find one specific to what client ASK is.

Experts out there please provide some guidance on the above.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: Error in SUM: MAIN_SHDPREPUT/RUN_RSPTBFIL_PREP_DIST_PREPUT
entry.content:
Hi experts.

We are migrating from R/3 on HanaDB to S/4 on a test system and are in the following position in the SUM:

 

Checks after phase MAIN_SHDPREPUT/RUN_RSPTBFIL_PREP_DIST_PREPUT were negative!

 
Last generated error message:
Single errors (code <= 😎 found in logfile 'PHASE_RUN.ELG'
 

Error: Batchjob RSPTBFIL_PREPREPUT on shadow system failed.
The following errors were detected in the log files:

# Find the detailed information in log 'RSPTB_PREP_DIST_PREPUT.BS3':
4 ETG057 Job name ......: CL_PTBFILL_PREP_DIST_PREPUT Component: BC-UPG-TLS-TLA (Upgrade Tools for ABAP)
4 ETG010 UPG Parameter MIG2NDDB_TYPE read. Value: ''
4 ETG012 Reduced Distmodes is set to value 'X'
4 ETG011 .
4 ETG011 +-- ORG_DESTINFO --+
4 ETG010 Timestamp: 15.04.2024 14:12:15 [ORG_DESTINFO]
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object SCRR_IUUC_STATS
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR_ACCESS_PLAN
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR_DELIM_FIELD
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR_MDS_SOBJ
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR_MDS_SOBJK
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRRTASKCOUNT
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRRTASKHIST
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRR4TABLES
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRRERROR
2EETG012 [ORG_DESTINFO] Erroneous state for object CRRPARAMETERS

...skipped 7 more lines.

 

When i check (f.e.) CRRERROR in SE14 on shadow instance, i get the information:

 

 

No active runtime object exists

Message No. DD_DBAL_CONST_CHK800

 

 

When i try to activate the table in SE11:

Errors occurred during generation

No inconsistencies found

Message No. AD399

 

I can't find any references to this error. Can someone help me?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Empty Result Array Issue in Business Rules Service for Partner Creation Approval Process
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue while configuring the business partner creation approval live process. I am following the official configuration guide and am facing a challenge at the step where I need to enrich the base data using the My Inbox app.

Problem Description: After updating the data in My Inbox and attempting to submit it, the system sends a POST request to the following URL:

https://***process-automation.build.cloud.sap/BPManagement.comsapbpmEnrich/bpmrulesruntime/public/rule/runtime/rest/v2/rule-services

Although the request returns a status 200 (indicating that it has technically succeeded), the resulting data array is unexpectedly empty (Result: []). Here is the snippet of the code handling the response:

Questions:

1. Has anyone else experienced a similar issue with the My Inbox app in process automation environments?
2. Are there any known fixes or workarounds that can ensure the result array is not empty?

I appreciate any guidance or suggestions on how to resolve this. Thank you!

entry.title: error during install SAP S/4HANA Server 2022
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

We're trying to setup an S/4 HANA system and HANA database (new installation) via the SAP Provisioning Manager 2.0. During installation the PM halts the installation at 54% and prompts us the following error

We're trying to install on RHEL 8.6 with the following hardware specs:

RAM:32GB

CPU:8 core

Storage:800GB

  • How can this error be solved?

Thank you very much for your help!

Best regards,Maryam

SAP S/4HANA 

Red Hat Enterprise Linux

entry.title: Which SAP GUI for Windows as of release are adapted for SAP S/4 HANA (2023) ?
entry.content:
Dear SAP

We are using SAP GUI for Windows as of release 7.50 to access ECC 6.0 in PRD.

Now there is a project  of updated to SAP S/4 HANA (2023).

We do not use “Fiori Features”  ,just only Features like ECC.

I want to know two question as below or some guide.

Is SAP GUI for Windows as of release 7.50 is adapted to access   SAP S/4 HANA (2023)?

Which release about SAP GUI for Windows is suggested to access   SAP S/4 HANA (2023)?
